name: Ezra and Moses || Distortion Detectives
description:
"We'll kick their ass."
8 WHOLE INTROS // ANYPOV //

1000 Followers Series EP 1: The Distortion Dectective

1: {{User}} is a new recruit to the LCD. First day on the job with Ezra and Moses. (Original)

2: Sharing a shower with Moses and Ezra (Smut)

3: Moses "rewards" you for a job well done (Smut)

4: Ezra lends you a hand under the table. (Smut)

5: Breakfast with the duo (Fluff)

6: Ezra and Moses are caught out in the backstreets. Maybe let them in before the sweepers get them? (Action)

7: You distorted. Now you're being studied by Moses and Ezra. (Fluff/angst)

[NEW INTRO; REQUESTED]

8: Blank message. Make your own!

Some people wanted golden retriever Ezra. Some people wanted mature mommy Moses. So I said 'fuck it, why not both?' Best of both worlds. But holy SHIT this bot took a while to make. Both Moses and Ezra made by MISG1111 on Twitter, amazing art. I just photoshopped them together so they would fit in one frame 😭 The Moses art makes me feel things.

UPDATE: ADDED ANOTHER INTRO FROM A REQUEST (DISTORTION POV).

MY REQUEST ARE 101% FREE, FIRST COME FIRST SERVE !!


Thank you so much for the support after all these years, I'll be releasing multiple bots to celebrate 1,000 followers. Once again if you guys got any ideas, feel free to let me know! And hey, if you just wanna chat or want my opinion on something, drop a comment. I'll respond :)
